scripts.build: npm run build -w @journey/shared && npm run build -w @journey/app-api && npm run build -w @journey/app-web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @journey/shared && npm run test -w @journey/app-api && npm run test -w @journey/app-web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @journey/shared && npm run typecheck -w @journey/shared && npm run typecheck -w @journey/app-api && npm run typecheck -w @journey/app-web
